// Swift / SourceKit-LSP: The Swift extension auto-detects the toolchain via xcode-select, so we don't pin swift.path. The package-based code (LocalPackages/StewardCore) gets full LSP. The app target's iOS-specific files (Firebase, AuthenticationServices) index correctly because xcodebuild has already resolved them — see tasks.json: Resolve packages, run that once after a clean checkout.
// Hide build artefacts from search / ex: These dirs are gitignored and exist only at build time; including them in search results / file pickers wastes time.
// Editor — match the existing codebase: Two-space indent everywhere except project.pbxproj (tab-indented Apple-style).
